title: Bitwise Ethereum Option Income Strategy ETF declares $1.733 dividend
content:
* Bitwise Ethereum Option Income Strategy ETF (IETH [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IETH]) declares $1.733/share monthly dividend [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20373966-bitwise-announces-monthly-distributions-for-imst-icoi-imra-igme-icrc-and-ieth].
 	* Payable Jan. 27; for shareholders of record Jan. 23; ex-div Jan. 23.
 	* See IETH Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IETH/dividends?source=news_bullet]
